nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of inaccuracy and misdirection
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI mostly for inspiration, summarisation and creativity

nodes.label: AI as tool requiring human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I always use it as a helpful tool rather than a standalone tool, I always adapt what it gives me rather than just trusting it

nodes.label: AI transcription accuracy for technical terms
nodes.grounding_span: many times the AI will get the transcript wrong as it doesn't 'hear' the same as a human

nodes.label: AI alignment with author's vision and context
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to steer toward user's creative vision
nodes.grounding_span: if the model doesn't provide you with something you like, it's hard to steer it away

nodes.label: Human emotional intelligence vs AI capability
nodes.grounding_span: creatively wise, it does not seem to get the emotional or creative aspects quite the same

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: What makes humans unique is their originality

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I will use AI to summarise certain parts for me so I can gauge a generalised understanding first of all

nodes.label: Accuracy and factual reliability
nodes.grounding_span: if I didn't double check myself I would have handed in the work wrong

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: One thing I felt particularly satisifed with is the creativity that some models can provide

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: the model has misheard a place that was mentioned and gave me an incorrect meaning and acronym

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I think it can only get better

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I always adapt what it gives me rather than just trusting it

nodes.label: Comparative human-AI reasoning
nodes.grounding_span: AI is smarter than a human as it is built to process a shit tonne of information but creatively wise, it does not seem to get the emotional or creative aspects
